page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at a base frequency of 2.55 GHz. The system is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and network interfaces with a baseline bandwidth of 7 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance, as evidenced by a stress-ng single-core score of 2677.3. Memory performance is also a highlight, with a strong PassMark memory score of 2753.61, though large-block uncached memory write bandwidth is relatively weak at 18.82 GB/sec. Multi-core processing, software compilation, and database operations fall within average performance tiers. For lightweight machine learning tasks, the instance achieves a strong text generation speed of 307.15 tokens per second using a small 135M parameter model, while medium 7B model inference remains average.

Given its dedicated AMD EPYC CPU allocation and balanced resource density, the ecs.g7a.4xlarge offers a stable, predictable performance profile for general-purpose workloads. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient choice for workloads that do not require high-speed local scratch space or hardware acceleration. It is well-suited for applications such as web serving, software compilation, database operations, and moderate Redis caching deployments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 16 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. Built on the KVM hypervisor, it is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, offering a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but includes no local storage or GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a 7 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmarks show strong single-core CPU performance and memory scores, alongside average multi-core and database execution speeds. However, large-block uncached memory write bandwidth is a relative bottleneck. This instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, software compilation, database operations, and lightweight text generation tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and a 7 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, suitable for database operations and web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 7 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and 64 GB of RAM for predictable application performance.
bullet_points: Powered by a 16-core AMD EPYC 7T83 processor at 2.55 GHz
Equipped with 64 GB of system memory (4 GB per core)
Features a 7 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
Best suited for web serving, database operations, and software compilation
